metadata.notes: HexHawk 1.0.0 internal tester candidate. Updater metadata is reachable and signed, but Windows artifacts remain unsigned for Authenticode/public-release purposes.

hexhawk_release_truth.signature_generated_by: tauri signer sign using local uncommitted updater key generated 2026-06-02
hexhawk_release_truth.proof_limit: This is valid updater metadata for the configured updater public key; it does not make the Windows installer Authenticode-signed.

dns_repair_actions.reason_configured_endpoint_uses_apex: hexhawk.ke already has working HTTPS and resolves through the default resolver; releases.hexhawk.ke DNS resolves through public resolvers but was not used as the Tauri endpoint in this pass because HTTPS virtual-host/certificate readiness was not separately proven.
